response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web technologies, with no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale, and minimal alignment with the job's core technical stack or leadership requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Strong history of building scalable systems and dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: Only 2 years of C++ experience (NI LabWindows), far below the 8-year minimum
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks explicit leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers or owning cloud architecture
